personal.name: Hussein Alali Alismael
personal.title: Backend Developer (Python/Django) | AI Engineering Student
personal.summary: Highly motivated 4th-year Informatics Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence, with a strong focus on Backend Development and Scalable APIs. Proficient in building robust server-side logic using Django REST Framework and integrating Neural Networks into functional systems. Experienced in hardware-software integration using Raspberry Pi and passionate about solving complex engineering problems through optimized code and logical design.

softSkills: Analytical Thinking: Expert at breaking down complex requirements into manageable technical tasks
Problem Solving: Strong ability to debug complex logic and optimize system-wide performance
Continuous Learning: Proactively staying updated with the latest trends in AI and backend architectures

projects.name: Rainfall Anomaly Explorer
projects.subtitle: ML for Humanitarian Support
projects.description: Engineered an end-to-end machine learning system to predict rainfall anomalies in Syria, achieving a 99.3% accuracy (R² = 0.9934) using XGBoost. Processed and analyzed over 11,000 satellite-derived observations to provide actionable insights for humanitarian aid and disaster preparedness. Implemented SHAP-based interpretability to explain model predictions, ensuring transparency for humanitarian stakeholders and decision-makers.

projects.name: Team Management System API
projects.subtitle: Backend
projects.description: Developed a secure backend infrastructure for team management using Django REST Framework. Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for task assignments, user authentication, and hierarchical team structures. Managed database schemas and optimized PostgreSQL queries to enhance data retrieval performance and system scalability.

projects.name: Agricultural AI Robot
projects.subtitle: Olive Fruit Fly Detection
projects.description: Engineered and trained a Neural Network model (GoogLeNet) to detect 'Olive Fruit Fly' infestations from image datasets. Implemented advanced image processing techniques to improve model accuracy and robustness across various environmental conditions. Integrated the AI model with backend services to provide real-time detection capabilities.

projects.name: Robotics & Hardware Integration
projects.subtitle: Raspberry Pi 4
projects.description: Developed custom robotic prototypes by bridging software logic with physical hardware control using Raspberry Pi 4. Programmed sensor data collection and motor control sequences, ensuring seamless communication between sensors and the central controller.

education.degree: Bachelor of Informatics Engineering – Specialization in AI
